pageHeader.title: QR Code Generator
pageHeader.description: Create QR codes for text, URLs, Wi‑Fi, email, phone, and SMS

qrFields.textPlaceholder: One line = one QR code. Paste or type multiple lines to batch generate.

qrPreview.title: QR preview
qrPreview.empty: Generated QR codes will appear here.

qrHistory.title: History (this device)
qrHistory.empty: No items yet. Generated codes appear here (max 1000, oldest removed first).
qrHistory.clearConfirmBody: This removes all saved QR entries from this browser. This cannot be undone.

guidGenerator.title: Generate GUIDs
guidGenerator.advancedSubtitle: Generate GUIDs based on a reference GUID with optional time offset.
guidGenerator.referenceGuidDescription: Generate GUIDs based on this reference GUID's timestamp
guidGenerator.timeOffsetDescription: Adjust the reference GUID's timestamp (requires reference GUID above)

pasteDownload.title: Paste to Download
pasteDownload.description: Copy an image to your clipboard (screenshot, photo, etc.), then paste it here — it downloads automatically.

passwordGenerator.title: Password Generator
passwordGenerator.description: Generate strong random passwords with customizable character sets.
passwordGenerator.noCharTypeSelected: Select at least one character type.

base64Viewer.title: Base64 Image Viewer
base64Viewer.description: A simple tool to view and decode base64 encoded images.
base64Viewer.inputPlaceholder: Paste your base64 image string or data URI here...

errors.title: Error
errors.copyFailed: Failed to copy to clipboard. Please try again.
errors.qrRenderFailed: Could not render QR code. Try shorter content or a different format.
errors.qrTextTooLong: Text is too long for a reliable QR code.
errors.qrTextBatchTooMany: Text batch is limited to {{max}} lines per run.
errors.qrUrlInvalid: That URL does not look valid.
errors.qrWifiPasswordRequired: Enter a password for this security type (or choose “None”).
errors.qrSmsNumberEmpty: Enter a phone number for SMS.
errors.guidInvalidQuantity: Please enter a valid quantity between 1 and 1000
errors.guidTimeOffsetNeedsReference: Time offset can only be used with a reference GUID
errors.guidInvalidTimeOffset: Please enter a valid time offset in milliseconds
errors.base64InvalidFormat: Invalid base64 image format. Please check your input.
